headline: United Airlines, Frontier, and Marriott Vacations Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after WTI crude crashed 4.7% to $92.94 on Iran-US peace deal progress, providing direct relief to airlines, hotels, cruise lines, and online travel agents.

headline: Marriott starts selling the sheets you like to sleep on

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $356
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Patrick Scholes   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Hold and raises the price target from $350 to $356.
